name: ShCh-301
events: 19 Aug 1941 ShCh-301 fires two torpedoes against the German merchant Theda Fritzen (2882 BRT) off Landsort, Sweden. The torpedoes missed their target.
24 Aug 1941 ShCh-301 fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 tons off Landsort, Sweden. The torpedo missed its target.
